---
title: "10 Immune Infiltration Analysis"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)
library(GSVA)
library(immunedeconv)

# Global Parameters
# 22 standard immune cell subtypes

# Data Import
# Import standardized expression matrix and group file

# Data Analysis
# 1. Calculation of immune cell infiltration scores
# 2. Inter-group differential analysis of immune infiltration
# 3. Correlation analysis between core genes and immune cells

# Visualization
# Immune infiltration heatmap, differential box plot, correlation plot

# Result Export
# Output immune score matrix and statistical table

# Result Description
# Explain immune analysis algorithm and subtype criteria
